mapper.select: SELECT cal_master_id AS calMasterId, cal_name AS calName, cal_type AS calType, owner_id AS ownerId, dept_id AS deptId, use_yn AS useYn, del_yn AS delYn, reg_id AS regId, reg_dt AS regDt, mod_id AS modId, mpd_dt AS modDt FROM TB_CALENDAR_MASTER WHERE del_yn = 'N'

SELECT cal_master_id AS calMasterId, cal_name AS calName, cal_type AS calType, owner_id AS ownerId, dept_id AS deptId, use_yn AS useYn, del_yn AS delYn, reg_id AS regId, reg_dt AS regDt FROM TB_CALENDAR_MASTER WHERE cal_master_id = #{calMasterId}

SELECT cal_share_id AS calShareId, cal_master_id AS calMasterId, target_type AS targetType, target_id AS targetId, perm_level AS permLevel, reg_id AS regId, reg_dt AS regDt FROM TB_CALENDAR_SHARE WHERE cal_master_id = #{calMasterId}

SELECT cal_master_id AS calMasterId, cal_name AS calName, cal_type AS calType, owner_id AS ownerId, dept_id AS deptId, use_yn AS useYn, del_yn AS delYn, reg_id AS regId, reg_dt AS regDt, mod_id AS modId, mpd_dt AS modDt, FROM TB_CALENDAR_MASTER WHERE cal_master_id = #{calMasterId}
